question: Give me the list of works composed by Mozart in the last 5 years of his life
sparql:
PREFIX ecrm: <http://erlangen-crm.org/current/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?work WHERE { ?work ecrm:P14_carried_out_by <http://data.doremus.org/artist/4802a043-23bb-3b8d-a443-4a3bd22ccc63> }
